# Ibai Fernandez Portfolio - Full LLM Index

Last-Updated: 2026-03-15
Base-URL: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/

## Overview
Portfolio focused on Full-Stack architecture, AI automation, UX/UI systems, and enterprise-scale marketing operations.

## Canonical Pages
- Home: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/
  - Purpose: profile, capabilities, work history, project index, testimonials, contact.
- DebTracker: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/debtracker.html
  - Purpose: zero-trust financial ledger case (Next.js, Server Actions, Firestore patterns, PWA integration).
- GymTracker: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/gymtracker.html
  - Purpose: local-first architecture case (Python/Flask, SQLite, deterministic AI pipelines, QA automation).
- LFi: Agency Operating Systems: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/lfi.html
  - Purpose: agency operating-systems case proving CRM routing, qualification logic, launch governance, and commercial reliability through the POCURO and Leben proof modules.
- The Route to Digitalization / 2x2MKT: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/ruta-de-la-digitalizacion-y-2x2-mkt.html
  - Purpose: nationwide upskilling, field operations, and crisis-proof digital adoption program impact.
- Portfolio Ibai Fernandez: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/portfolio-ibaifernandez.html
  - Purpose: living proof of delivery capability through CI/CD, performance hardening, accessibility, and production validation.
- MyBoard: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/my-board.html
  - Purpose: local-first Kanban product proving zero vendor lock-in, modular architecture, and a clear runway toward enterprise and AI-assisted use.
- The Research Engine: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/the-research-engine.html
  - Purpose: productized intelligence workflow pack sold through a VSL + Gumroad funnel, proving end-to-end digital product and GTM execution.
- Elm St: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/elm-st.html
  - Purpose: cinematic brand system, reel-first UX, and custom audiovisual portfolio architecture case.
- AGLAYA: https://portfolio.ibaifernandez.com/aglaya.html
  - Purpose: conversion-first remote agency operating system, staged growth services, and brand-evaluation-driven acquisition case.
